items.claim: Nureullo Aliev lands less than three significant strikes per minute.
items.quote: He lands less than three strikes per minute, significant strikes per minute. He's a low volume guy.

items.claim: Mike Davis has a 60% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: Mike Davis's case, it's like you could look at, oh well, he's got 60% takedown def.

items.claim: Mike Davis is starting to slow down and getting a little bit older.
items.quote: I do think Mike Davis is starting to slow down. He's starting to get a little bit older.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a strong wrestling and grappling background with notable regional and amateur accomplishments.
items.quote: he went 8-0 as an amateur and that included he was the 2015 IMAF European champ, the 2016 IMAF World Champ.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and his cardio is declining.
items.quote: Cody Gibson just doesn't have the cardio to keep up anymore. He's 38 years old.

items.claim: Cody Gibson suffered a first-round knockout loss in his previous fight against Ricky Leute.
items.quote: Last time out against a Richie Lang, knocked down 21 seconds.
